mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO template_variable ( template_id, variable_code, variable_name, variable_type, required, default_value, options_json, description, sort_no, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.templateId}, #{item.variableCode}, #{item.variableName}, #{item.variableType}, #{item.required}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.optionsJson}, #{item.description}, #{item.sortNo}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, variable_code, variable_name, variable_type, required, default_value, options_json, description, sort_no, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM template_variable WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
